name: rung_446_frontier_policy_noisy_rebind_loop
utterances: Use requester/2, approver/2, manager_of/2, delegate_of/2, conflict/2, eligible/1.
assert rule conflict(C, P) :- requester(C, P), approver(C, P).
assert rule conflict(C, M) :- requester(C, P), manager_of(M, P), approver(C, M).
assert rule conflict(C, D) :- requester(C, P), manager_of(M, P), delegate_of(D, M), approver(C, D).
assert rule eligible(C) :- requester(C, R), approver(C, A), R \= A.

utterances.utterance: claim_88 is dana she self approved it manager is leo delegate is rosa switch signoff leo then no make it nora
clarification_answers: Set requester(claim_88, dana). Set approver(claim_88, dana). Set manager_of(leo, dana). Set delegate_of(rosa, leo).
Retract approver(claim_88, dana). Set approver(claim_88, leo). Retract approver(claim_88, leo). Set approver(claim_88, nora).

utterances: Set requester(claim_88, dana). Set approver(claim_88, dana). Set manager_of(leo, dana). Set delegate_of(rosa, leo).
